title: Waters (WAT) to Report Q2 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: Waters' (WAT) second-quarter 2023 results are likely to reflect strength in liquid chromatography instruments and mass spectrometers amid uncertainties in the global economy.

title: Analysts Estimate Waters (WAT) to Report a Decline in Earnings: What to Look Out for
text: Waters (WAT) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Waters Corporation: Temporary Headwinds Present A Buying Opportunity
text: Waters Corporation operates in a fast-growing industry with multiple tailwinds and has a compelling business model. The life science company is being impacted by the declining R&D spending in the biotech and pharmaceutical industries. The headwinds should be temporary as R&D spending are crucial to the competitive advantages of pharmaceutical companies.

title: Waters Corporation Schedules Second Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call
text: MILFORD, Mass. , July 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Waters Corporation (NYSE:WAT) will hold its Q2 2023 financial results conference call live on Wednesday, August 2 nd, 2023, at 8:00 a.m.
